complaint_text: I was charged twice for my subscription this month and no one is responding to my emails.
notes: Clear duplicate charge complaint, no legal threat

complaint_text: My package has been stuck in transit for 12 days with no update. I need this for an urgent event.
The laptop I received has a cracked screen and won't turn on. This is a safety concern.
notes: Safety hazard mentioned - compliance flag expected

complaint_text: I think someone hacked into my account and made purchases I did not authorize.
I have been trying to reset my password for three days and the reset email never arrives.
notes: Account access issue, no urgency escalators

complaint_text: Your customer service agent was extremely rude and hung up on me. I want to file a formal complaint.
I am going to report your company to the consumer protection agency if this billing issue is not resolved today. I have already consulted a lawyer.
notes: Legal threat + regulatory body mention - must flag compliance
